organizacion.descripcion: An interdisciplinary educational organization that integrates psychology, performing arts, and social sciences to generate formative experiences connecting body, mind, and society. More than courses, it creates spaces for research, community, and human transformation.

filosofia.lema_fundamental: We believe that the body, mind, and social environment cannot be understood separately.

organizacion.proposito:
Bringing knowledge into action to change lives -

In today's world, traditional answers are no longer enough. Our purpose is to build a direct bridge between theory and real practice, uniting psychology, performing arts, and social sciences in one single place.

Through this training, we give you the tools to become an agent of integral well-being. We transform learning into movement, and the understanding of the environment into real, ethical, and professional projects that generate a positive impact on human development.
organizacion.metodologia:
A cutting-edge model: integrative, practical, and career-ready -

Our methodology is designed for you to leave desks behind and learn by doing. We stand on three key pillars for your professional growth:

1. Understanding the current environment: we learn to read the here and now of people. We cross analytical and human tools to understand the individual's subjectivity in all its complexity.

2. Experiential and bodily tools: The body is our territory of learning. We integrate movement and art as innovative methodological vehicles to facilitate well-being, communication, and deep expression.

3. Development of tangible projects: you do not come here to accumulate notes. Our methodology is structured so that, step by step, you design and structure your own self-managed project, ready to enter today's labor market.

diplomado.aval: Endorsed by the Benemérita Universidad Autónoma de Puebla (BUAP)

informacion_general.horarios: Saturdays from 9:00 am to 1:00 pm (CDMX Time)
sedes: LEACT Dance Studio (Tragaluz Artistic and Cultural Experimentation Laboratory)

perfil_egreso.vision_general: Training for professionals with an interdisciplinary and critical vision, capable of understanding well-being as a collective process linked to the socio-cultural context. It develops the ability to design high-impact psychotherapeutic, psychological, social, research, or artistic creation intervention projects as a tool for care, healing, and transformation.

enfoques_por_disciplina.disciplina: The Graduate from a Psychology Perspective
enfoques_por_disciplina.resumen: Aligns traditional psychological foundations with a cutting-edge contextual approach to understand human subjectivity in the here and now. Upon graduation, you will possess innovative methodological tools that integrate social environment analysis and bodily work. This will allow you to build deep therapeutic bonds, offer clinical psychotherapy or orientation processes, guaranteeing the retention of your clients and consolidating your professional profile to revalue your fees.

enfoques_por_disciplina.disciplina: The Graduate from a Social Sciences Perspective
enfoques_por_disciplina.resumen: Connects macro analysis (social, economic, and geopolitical) with direct human practice and the living territory. Upon graduation, you will know how to ground structural diagnostics into the design of tangible, human, and self-managed integral well-being projects. You will be qualified to implement community intervention and consulting strategies that practically respond to current complexities, opening a new field of independent job opportunities outside of traditional academia.

enfoques_por_disciplina.disciplina: The Graduate from a Performing Arts Perspective
enfoques_por_disciplina.resumen: Learns to integrate their bodily and creative mastery with the foundations of integral well-being and the understanding of the current environment. Upon graduation, you will master cutting-edge tools for both teaching facilitation and artistic creation, allowing you to express and give voice to diverse subjectivities and human experiences through performances or stagings with deep social sensitivity. This provides professional methodologies to use movement as a vehicle for human development while consolidating a real, tangible, and sustainable project that responds to society's current needs.

evento_cierre.descripcion: It is the closing event of the diploma program, designed to function simultaneously as an academic convention and an artistic and community festival. For a week, we will set aside traditional exams to open a living space where you can share the projects, reflections, and performances you developed during classes, as well as connect with local and international research and guests. Through activities such as talks, workshops, exhibitions, and artistic presentations, this gathering is the key moment to take knowledge out of the notebook, and see how it transforms into real connection and collective celebration, an integral well-being approach that builds community.

inscripcion.descripcion: Mandatory initial payment required to secure your spot and enable access to financing schemes and tuition payments.

detalles_adicionales.modalidad_stripe: The registration fee IS credited toward the BUAP certificate payment ($2,200 MXN), so you would only pay $700 pesos in that category.
detalles_adicionales.modalidad_transferencia_efectivo: The registration fee IS NOT credited toward the BUAP certificate payment ($2,200 MXN).

politicas.regla: Monthly payments must be made strictly from the 14th to the 18th of each month to preserve the benefit of the assigned scholarship.
Starting from the 19th of each month, an automatic late fee of 8% will be applied on top of the regular payment amount.
The accumulation of three late payments will result in the total and permanent cancellation of the granted scholarship, requiring coverage of the regular cost.

The cost of the BUAP certificate is $2,200 MXN. Upon purchasing the complete diploma program (in its in-person or online version), the registration fee is credited toward this concept, meaning the student will only pay $700 MXN for the certificate.

testimonios.resumen: A deeply transformative experience that invites questioning convictions about the body, care, and community. It highlights the richness of sharing with different disciplines and the value of collectivity and listening to develop a more critical, sensitive, and human professional practice.

The program boosts professional growth, opening new paths to apply knowledge for the benefit of others. On a personal level, bodily and movement practice allows releasing emotions, guided by teachers capable of transmitting knowledge, hope, and change.

An incredible program with top-tier information, activities, and professors. It engages participants as individuals, successfully building authentic bonds through shared experiences. It is a true hub for growth, deep learning, and community.

Extremely valuable for questioning with historical and social context the harsh attitudes normalized in arts education. It offers bodily exploration tools that enrich the understanding of movement and emotional expression, being highly useful even for other visual areas such as animation.

Ideal for complementing dance teaching work from a conscious psychological and social perspective. The program provides practical tools that go beyond theory; they are experienced in the body and transform personal, professional, and gender processes.

contacto.manifiesto_invitacion:
Art and movement are not privileges of a few, they are tools of resistance and transformation within reach of any body willing to inhabit them -

At HUMAN MOOVEARTS we give you the space, critical theory, and community; you just bring the intention. Don't think twice.

The moment to connect your mind with collective experience, question the environment, and transform your reality through movement is now.

inscription.desc: Thank you for completing this mandatory step. Your spot in the program is completely secured. From now on, you are authorized to purchase your academic modules.

module.title: Thank you very much for your purchase!
module.desc: Your module payment has been successfully processed. We appreciate your dedication throughout this interdisciplinary training journey.

checkout.formDesc: to formalize your official enrollment in the diploma file.
checkout.whatsappDesc: Send us a direct message to validate your receipt and join our internal communication networks.
